ops.title: Migrate ~/.getaway/preferences.json v1→v2 and seed first trip plan
ops.description: After getaway schema v2 lands: run the CHANGELOG jq del() migration on the live file (del cabin/trip_length_days/departure_days/avoid_destinations, version=2, avoid_transit=[]; the live file has NO statuses key — del()-based, never rebuild from a key list), then seed the in-flight ask via `plan-new 2026-07-warm-beachy-week` + `plan-set` (warm/beachy week outside North America, business, window ~2026-07-12→16, avoid_final_destinations ICN/GMP/NRT/HND). Plan file: /Users/yasyf/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-12/plans/when-i-say-i-refactored-snowglobe.md §6.

ops.text: getaway.sh prefs | jq .version prints 2 on the real HOME, with no statuses key present
getaway.sh plan-show | jq .slug prints "2026-07-warm-beachy-week" with avoid_final_destinations == ["ICN","GMP","NRT","HND"]
